paper_title: Assessing the national burden of allergic asthma by web-search data, pollen counts, and drug prescriptions in Germany and Sweden

methods.description: This method involves using Google Ads Keyword Planner to assess the search volume for 'allergic asthma' in Sweden and Germany from January 2018 to December 2021. The tool provides a list of relevant keywords and their monthly search volume, which is used to analyze public interest and awareness regarding allergic asthma.

steps.description: Use Google Ads Keyword Planner to assess the search volume regarding 'allergic asthma' in Sweden and Germany from January 2018 to December 2021.
steps.searchable_summary: extract search volume data for 'allergic asthma' from Google Ads Keyword Planner

steps.description: Qualitatively assess and categorize identified keywords into predefined categories.

methods.description: This method involves collecting climate data for Sweden and Germany from respective meteorological institutes to analyze the potential impact of climate on allergic asthma.

steps.description: Obtain climate data for Sweden from the Swedish Meteorological and Hydrological Institute.
steps.searchable_summary: download climate data for Sweden from SMHI
outputs: mean monthly temperature and precipitation data for Sweden

steps.description: Obtain climate data for Germany from the Climate Data Center of the German weather service.
steps.searchable_summary: download climate data for Germany from Climate Data Center
inputs: Climate Data Center of the German weather service
outputs: mean monthly temperature and precipitation data for Germany

methods.description: This method involves collecting data on prescriptions of specific asthma-related drugs in Sweden to analyze trends in medication use.

steps.description: Obtain data on prescriptions of beta-2-sympathomimetics, inhalative glucocorticoids, and 'other systemic drugs for obstructive pulmonary disease' from the National Board of Health and Welfare in Sweden.
steps.searchable_summary: download prescription data from National Board of Health and Welfare in Sweden
inputs: National Board of Health and Welfare

methods.description: This method involves collecting pollen count data from Sweden and Bavaria to analyze the relationship between pollen levels and allergic asthma.

steps.description: Obtain pollen counts for Sweden from the Swedish Museum of Natural History.
steps.searchable_summary: download pollen count data from Swedish Museum of Natural History
outputs: daily average pollen counts for Sweden

steps.description: Obtain pollen counts for Bavaria from the Center Allergy and Environment Munich.
steps.searchable_summary: download pollen count data from Center Allergy and Environment Munich

steps.description: Aggregate Bavarian pollen counts by arithmetic mean.
steps.searchable_summary: aggregate pollen counts by arithmetic mean
